summary: Gruber notes the release of Movable Type 3.0's developer edition by Six Apart and confirms that both of his MT plug-ins, SmartyPants and Markdown, are fully compatible with the new version. This is a brief, informational announcement aimed at users of his tools.
key_points: Six Apart released a developer edition of Movable Type 3.0
Both SmartyPants and Markdown plug-ins are confirmed compatible with MT 3.0
The post assumes widespread awareness of the MT 3.0 release among his readership
money_quotes: In the incredibly unlikely case that you haven't heard, Six Apart has released a "developer edition" of Movable Type 3.0.
key_insight: A brief compatibility notice confirming Gruber's Markdown and SmartyPants plug-ins work with the newly released Movable Type 3.0.
